other_findings.finding: Rare in prenatal skin but present in several developing organs
Excluded from fibroblast trajectory analysis due to being primarily from one 7 PCW sample

evidence_quotes.quote: We excluded FRZB + fibroblasts, which were primarily observed in one sample from the earliest gestation stage (7 PCW)
Although rare in prenatal skin, FRZB-expressing fibroblasts were present in several other developing organs
